title: Hero
why_this_song: Hero by Enrique Iglesias (2001) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Let me be your hero"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "You can take my very breath away"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "And would you save my soul tonight?"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "I can kiss away the pain"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "I can kiss away the pain"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: You can take my breath away
Oh, I just wanna hold you
I just want to hold you, oh, yeah
I can be your hero, baby
I can kiss away the pain
I will stand by you forever
You can take my very breath away

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "hero" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "hero" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "breath" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "breath" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Would you swear that you'll always be mine?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Hero" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Hero" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Hero" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Hero", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Hero" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Hero" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
